title: rhynchoglossum obliquum
intro: Rhynchoglossum obliquum, also known as the bent tongue orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. The medicinal properties of Rhynchoglossum obliquum include its use in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Rhynchoglossum obliquum typically involve drying and processing the plant's roots and leaves to create teas, infusions, and decoctions for medicinal use.
